description: SLO/SLA Dashboard — Four Golden Signals, Error Budget and Kubernetes Infrastructure (cluster: do-prod)

panels.description: CPU saturation per node. Orange line: 70%, red: 90%.
panels.title: CPU per Node (%)

panels.description: Memory saturation per node. Alert at 70-90%.
panels.title: Memory per Node (%)

panels.description: Disk usage per mountpoint. Above 90%: availability risk.
panels.title: Disk per Node / Mountpoint (%)

panels.description: Network traffic per node. TX displayed as negative for symmetric visualization.
panels.title: Network per Node - RX (+) / TX (-)

panels.description: Container restarts in the last hour. Instability indicator.
panels.title: Container Restarts (1h)

panels.description: Failed CronJobs (e.g.: thanos-compactor). Monitor to ensure data compaction.
panels.title: Failed Jobs (CronJobs)

panels.description: Pod overview. Pods with many restarts indicate instability (possible P2/P1).
panels.title: Pods by Namespace - Status and Restarts

panels.description: Pod history by phase. Drop in Running with increase in Failed = P1/P2.
panels.title: Pods by Phase Over Time

panels.description: Divergence between desired and ready replicas indicates an availability issue.
panels.title: Deployments - Desired Replicas vs Ready

panels.description: Request response time. RTO reference: 1h. High latency indicates degradation (P2/P1).
panels.title: Latency - P50 / P95 / P99

panels.description: Volume of received requests. Monitor spikes that may indicate saturation or attacks.
panels.title: Traffic - Requests per Second

panels.description: Red line = SLO limit (0.1%). Above: Error Budget being consumed. P1 if total impact.
panels.title: Errors - 5xx Request Rate (%)

panels.description: CPU saturation. Above 90%: P2 risk. Above 70%: early warning.
panels.title: Saturation - CPU per Node (%)

panels.description: SLI: % of 2xx/3xx requests over total. SLO target: 99.9%.
panels.title: Availability SLO - Target: 99.9% (30d)

panels.description: Budget = 0.1% of monthly time (~43min). Consumption based on 5xx errors.
panels.title: Error Budget Remaining (30d)

panels.description: Returns 1 (OK) if monthly availability >= 99.5%. Formal SLA.
panels.title: SLA - Target: 99.5% (compliance)

panels.description: % 5xx requests in the last 5 minutes. P1 threshold: immediate impact.
panels.title: Error Rate (5m)

panels.description: Error budget consumption (0.1% monthly) by job/service. Above 100%: SLO breached.
panels.title: Error Budget Consumed by Service (30d) - Alert above 75%
Observability Stack - Health of Prometheus, Thanos and Exporters

panels.description: Targets with failing scrape. Immediate alert if > 0.
panels.title: Prometheus - Failed Targets

panels.description: Local TSDB database size. Configured retention: 24h.
panels.title: Prometheus TSDB - Size

panels.description: Volume of samples being ingested by Prometheus. Sharp drop = collection issue.
panels.title: Prometheus - Ingested Samples (rate 5m)

panels.description: Active targets per scrape job. Drop indicates connectivity issue or exporter down.
panels.title: Targets UP by Job (Prometheus)

panels.description: remote_write requests received by Thanos Receive. Drop = Prometheus not sending data.
panels.title: Thanos Receive - Remote Write Requests

title: SLO/SLA & Infrastructure
